response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js and DLang expertise, but he critically lacks the two non-negotiable requirements for this role: substantial C++ development on Windows (his only C++ exposure is roughly 6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a student thesis project) and capital-markets or fixed-income domain knowledge (RIDE Capital was a fintech/tax-optimization startup, not a capital-markets firm). He lists SQL generically but shows no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle work. The optional desirables he does meet—CI/CD and some Java—are insufficient to offset the missing core requirements.
strengths: Demonstrated CI/CD pipeline setup and maintenance across multiple roles (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory)
Java development experience at Altom Consulting, partially satisfying one optional desirable
Long career showing adaptability across diverse stacks and environments, suggesting capacity to learn new domains
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a thesis project), far below the 5–10 years required
No evidence of Windows-platform development; career is predominantly Linux/cloud environments
Zero capital-markets, fixed-income, or investment-banking domain exposure; RIDE Capital does not qualify as capital-markets experience
